Per-Strategy Annual Projection

Extrapolated from 5.3-year BINANCE backtest (Dec 2020 → Apr 2026), scaled to live sizing: $50 margin × 10x = $500 notional (vs $1000 backtest). Scale factor 0.50× applied. Assumes steady regime — real returns will deviate.

Strategy Symbol TF PF Trades/Yr Annual % (Backtest) Projected Annual $ Max DD

Disclaimer

These projections are not guarantees. Profit factor and trade counts come from historical BINANCE data and assume the bot's filters match the TradingView Pine backtest exactly. Variables that can cause divergence: exchange slippage/funding/latency, regime changes (2020-2024 had strong trends), strategies running simultaneously on finite capital (8 concurrent max), and tax/withdrawal timing. Treat the ranking as more reliable than the absolute $.

Latest Whale Signal Scan

Last scan at 2026-05-03T02:32:16.692777+00:00. DIVERGENCE = smart vs rekt opposite (higher conviction, 1.5× size). CONSENSUS = ≥80% smart-money agreement. Crowded-trade + edge-decay filters applied.

Coin WEEX Symbol Signal Direction Confidence Smart Long% Smart Short% #Traders Funding Liq Risk / Fuel Recency Reasoning
ENA ENAUSDT CONSENSUS_SHORT SHORT 10/10 11% 89% 9 +1.4% — — smart short 89% (9 wallets) · net $-7.2M · uPnL $+3,759,949

How this bot trades

Source: Hyperliquid public API (leaderboard + clearinghouseState). 15-min poll cadence.
Signal: Smart-money basket (top 20 by all-time PnL) vs rekt basket (worst 20 monthly, $1k+ accounts). A coin classifies as DIVERGENCE when ≥70% of smart money and ≥70% of rekt sit on opposite sides. It classifies as CONSENSUS when ≥80% of smart money agrees, regardless of rekt.
Filters: min 5 smart-money traders per coin · smart basket must be winning on the coin (edge-decay guard) · skip if both smart AND rekt are crowded on the same side · coin must be listed on WEEX.
Sizing: Consensus $500 notional ($50 × 10x), Divergence $750 ($75 × 10x). Stops: 1.5× ATR(14,4H), Targets: 3.0× ATR (2R reward:risk). Early exit if smart-money consensus drops below 55%.
Caveat: Whale edge decays. Expect 30–80% Y1, 10–30% Y2, 0–15% Y3 without re-tuning. Retune thresholds quarterly.
